name: node-braces
title: node-braces
summary: Fast, comprehensive, bash-like brace expansion implemented in JS
description:
Fast, comprehensive, bash-like brace expansion implemented in JS
Complete support for the Bash 4.3 braces specification, without sacrificing
speed.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-braces because Fast, comprehensive, bash-like brace expansion implemented in JS.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-braces as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-braces with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-braces --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
